message:
fix: forward vendored feature flag to frankenterm-core (GH #45)

The vendored feature on the CLI crate was defined as just
["frankenterm"] but did not forward to frankenterm-core/vendored,
meaning #[cfg(feature = "vendored")] code in frankenterm-core was
never activated when building via the CLI crate's vendored feature.

Changed to ["frankenterm", "frankenterm-core/vendored"] so the
feature propagates correctly through the dependency chain.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -62,7 +62,7 @@ default = [
     "asupersync-runtime",
 ]
 frankenterm = ["frankenterm-core/frankenterm"]
-vendored = ["frankenterm"]  # backward compat alias
+vendored = ["frankenterm", "frankenterm-core/vendored"]  # backward compat alias
 browser = ["frankenterm-core/browser"]
 mcp = ["frankenterm-core/mcp"]
 web = ["frankenterm-core/web"]
